  FreeBSD src repository

  Modified files:        (Branch: RELENG_7)
    etc/rc.d             hostid 
  Log:
  MFC:
          Specify the full path to the md5(1) binary so the script will
          still work even if it's not in the shell's path.
          PR: conf/122215

  1.7.2.1   +1 -1      src/etc/rc.d/hostid
